title: SpoiledZ
description: Fabric seasons mod addon which adds spoilage to food items
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/I8nVryg.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/SpoiledZ/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/SpoiledZ/issues)


This mod is an addon for the [fabric seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons) mod which adds spoilage to food items. This is hardcoded to two years. If the food item is spoiled and eaten, the nutrition is decreased and the player will get some debuffs. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/SASnm1J.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
